overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a black coat and hat walking through the historic city of Saint Denis at night. The character moves from a narrow brick courtyard onto gas-lit cobblestone streets, past a stone church and commercial buildings with red lanterns, through a narrow alleyway, and into a wooden courtyard with balconies.

scene_state.functional_zone: brick courtyard with barrels and lantern light

events.description: character walks through archway from enclosed courtyard onto open street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow brick courtyard toward an archway exit

entered.detail: tall weathered brick walls surrounding the courtyard
stacked wooden barrels near the wall
warm glowing lantern illuminating the corner
stone archway leading to the street beyond

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed brick courtyard at night, illuminated by a single warm lantern. The character walks forward toward a stone archway, transitioning from the sheltered courtyard to the open street beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with gas lamps and stone church

events.description: horse rider passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone street past a stone church and gas lamps

notable_agents.action: horse rider trotting past on the street

entered.detail: large Gothic stone church with arched windows and iron fence
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
tall clock tower visible above the street
wooden park bench on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a historic cobblestone street lined with gas lamps. A large stone church with Gothic windows dominates the right side, while a clock tower rises on the left. A horse rider passes by on the street around the 12-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with red lanterns and string lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past storefronts with decorative lighting

notable_agents.action: man sitting on the sidewalk near the building wall

entered.detail: red paper lanterns hanging across the street
decorative string lights above the storefronts
raised wooden sidewalk platform

segments.scene_description: The character continues down a commercial street decorated with red paper lanterns and string lights. The wet cobblestones reflect the warm glow of the lamps. A man sits on the wooden sidewalk to the left as the character passes by storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alleyway with brick walls

events.description: character turns left into a narrow covered alley between brick buildings
emerging from dark alley into a lit wooden courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow dark alleyway toward an archway

entered.detail: tall brick walls enclosing the narrow passage
wooden ceiling covering the alleyway
dim electric lights hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow enclosed alleyway with brick walls and overhead cover. The lighting becomes significantly darker with only sparse ceiling lights illuminating the path. The character walks toward an archway leading to a wooden courtyard visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden courtyard with balconies and exterior staircases

events.description: character enters open wooden courtyard with two-story balconies

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard and looking around at the wooden architecture

entered.detail: second-floor wooden balconies with railings
wooden staircases leading to upper floors on both sides
wooden cart with supplies parked in the courtyard
warm lanterns mounted on the courtyard walls

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into an open courtyard surrounded by two-story wooden buildings with exterior staircases and balconies. Warm wall lanterns illuminate the space. A wooden cart sits to the right as the character walks toward the center of the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick passage leading to exit

events.description: character walks through archway leaving courtyard into narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage toward a distant red light

entered.detail: close brick walls of the narrow exit passage
red lantern glowing at the far end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character exits the courtyard through an archway into another narrow enclosed passage. The walls are close on both sides, and a red light is visible at the far end of the tunnel-like corridor as the character continues walking forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the nocturnal streets of Saint Denis, transitioning from enclosed brick courtyards into open, gas-lit thoroughfares before returning to narrow passages. It begins in a sheltered brick courtyard illuminated by a single lantern, moving forward through a stone archway to emerge onto a wide cobblestone street flanked by a Gothic church and a towering clock. As the character continues, the scene shifts toward a commercial district where wet stones reflect the glow of red paper lanterns and string lights, before turning sharply into a dark, overhead-covered alleyway. The path then opens into a wooden courtyard surrounded by two-story buildings with balconies and exterior stairs, finally narrowing once more as the camera passes through an archway into a tunnel-like corridor leading toward a distant red light.
